homepage.title: Heidi Alexander MP
headings: h2: An experienced, local voice for Swindon South
h3: Swindon is my home. It’s time to change our country for the better. The hard work starts now .
h2: Thank you for choosing me to be your Labour MP in Swindon South.
h3: “ I’m a Swindon girl, born and bred. It’s the honour of my life to be elected for my hometown. I won’t let you down. ”
homepage.text_excerpt: Heidi Alexander MP 0 Skip to Content Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact An experienced, local voice for Swindon South Learn More Learn More Swindon is my home. It’s time to change our country for the better. The hard work starts now . Swindon gave me a belief that with hard work and determination I could achieve anything. I want young people growing up here today to feel the same . Thank you for choosing me to be your Labour MP in Swindon South. Thank you to for giving me the opportunity to serve our wonderful town. I am proud to be the Labour Member of Parliament for Swindon South. I want to do all I can to deliver a better and fairer future for our town and country. I will represent our whole community with dedication and humility. Get in contact Get in contact “ I’m a Swindon girl, born and bred. It’s the honour of my life to be elected for my hometown. I won’t let you down. ” — Heidi Alexander Heidi Alexander Labour MP for Swindon South Secretary of State for Transport Privacy Policy Promoted by Patrick Herring on behalf of Heidi Alexander, both at Suite 11, Marlborough House, 26 High Street, Old Town, Swindon, SN1 3EP Follow Twitter Facebook Instagram

pages.title: Appointments — Heidi Alexander MP
pages.text_excerpt: Appointments — Heidi Alexander MP 0 Skip to Content Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Upcoming Advice Surgeries “Book an appointment to see me.” As part of my promise to be accessible and responsive as your MP, I am holding regular face-to-face surgeries every 2nd and 4th Friday of the month, where we can meet and discuss any concerns or issues you may have. Where a matter can be dealt with by email, you can receive help more quickly by writing to me at Heidi.Alexander.MP@parliament.uk. Upcoming Surgery Dates 10th April, 2026 4pm - 6pm West Swindon 24th April, 2026 4pm - 6pm East Swindon 15th May, 2026 4pm - 6pm Central Swindon 22nd May, 2026 4pm - 6pm West Swindon To request an appointment, send us a message by clicking the button below. Remember to include your full name, address, and brief details of the topic for discussion. You will then be contacted by my office. Strict parliamentary protocol means appointments can only be offered to constituents of Swindon South, in my capacity as your constituency MP. Request an appointment Request an appointment Heidi Alexander Labour MP for Swindon South Secretary of State for Transport Privacy Policy Promoted by Patrick Herring on behalf of Heidi Alexander, both at Suite 11, Marlborough House, 26 High Street, Old Town, Swindon, SN1 3EP Follow Twitter Facebook Instagram

pages.title: Support - Heidi Alexander — Heidi Alexander MP
headings: h3: It is an honour to represent the community that I was born and brought up in.
pages.text_excerpt: Support - Heidi Alexander — Heidi Alexander MP 0 Skip to Content Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Heidi Alexander MP Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home My Story My Promise Advice Surgery Get In Contact It is an honour to represent the community that I was born and brought up in. I couldn’t sit on the sidelines and do nothing about the vacuum of honesty, integrity and decency at the heart of the previous Government. I’m proud to be part of the changed Labour Party. I’d love to hear from you, so please get in touch. Get in touch I am proud to be from Swindon South, I will always be on the side of Swindon South, and I will always work hard as your Labour MP. me@heidialexander.org.uk 07742 549 968 Heidi Alexander Labour MP for Swindon South Secretary of State for Transport Privacy Policy Promoted by Patrick Herring on behalf of Heidi Alexander, both at Suite 11, Marlborough House, 26 High Street, Old Town, Swindon, SN1 3EP Follow Twitter Facebook Instagram
